name: UBA : User Added to a Group on SharePoint or OneDrive by Site Admin
notes: Detects a user being added to a group in Sharepoint or OneDrive by a Site Admin.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event QID is one of the following (101250121) User added to group
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Added to a Group on SharePoint or OneDrive by Site Admin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250121) User added to group
